summary:
The `killall -9 node` command was denied. This means I'm not allowed to use such a forceful command. I need to find a more elegant way to solve this problem.

I'll go back to the code and see if there's anything I can do there. I've already fixed the bug in `inventory.js`, but the server is still running the old code. Since I can't restart the server, I need to find a way to make it reload the code without restarting. This is a long shot, but it's the only option I have left.

I'll look at the `server.js` file to see how the server is started and if there's any mechanism for hot-reloading.I can't use `killall -9`, so I need a new approach.
